news.title:
Kotak Sec recommends BUY on Jubilant Ingrevia & Vishal Mega Mart, citing strong growth potential.
VMM sees robust expansion, Jubilant Ingrevia focuses on high-margin speciality chemicals for future growth.
news.summary:
Kotak Sec recommends BUY on Jubilant Ingrevia & Vishal Mega Mart, citing strong growth potential.
VMM sees robust expansion, Jubilant Ingrevia focuses on high-margin speciality chemicals for future growth.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia completed acquisition of 100% stake in Remidex Pharma.
Details of the transaction were disclosed earlier on March 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia completed acquisition of 100% stake in Remidex Pharma.
Details of the transaction were disclosed earlier on March 13, 2026.

news.title:
Shyam Sunder Bhartia Family Trust disclosed pledge creation of Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd shares as per SEBI regulations.
Shares were pledged as security for loans via Bajaj Finance Ltd; post-event holding is 1.73% of total share capital.
news.summary:
Shyam Sunder Bhartia Family Trust disclosed pledge creation of Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd shares as per SEBI regulations.
Shares were pledged as security for loans via Bajaj Finance Ltd; post-event holding is 1.73% of total share capital.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia starts dispatches from Bharuch under CDMO contract; shares rose 2.37% to ₹584.75.
Q3 profits fell 32.4% YoY to ₹47cr; revenue flat at ₹1,051cr; interim dividend of ₹2.50/share announced.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia starts dispatches from Bharuch under CDMO contract; shares rose 2.37% to ₹584.75.
Q3 profits fell 32.4% YoY to ₹47cr; revenue flat at ₹1,051cr; interim dividend of ₹2.50/share announced.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia's subsidiary starts commercial production of Agro Intermediate at Bharuch site.
Material dispatch has commenced; event recorded on March 21, 2026, at 3:38 PM IST.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia's subsidiary starts commercial production of Agro Intermediate at Bharuch site.
Material dispatch has commenced; event recorded on March 21, 2026, at 3:38 PM IST.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia acquired Remidex Pharma for Rs. 16.5 crore in cash.
The acquisition aims to strengthen its human nutrition premixes segment.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia acquired Remidex Pharma for Rs. 16.5 crore in cash.
The acquisition aims to strengthen its human nutrition premixes segment.

news.title:
UPL's demerger structure raises concerns due to holding company discounts, potentially capping shareholder value.
Kotak highlights chemical sector gains from easing tariffs; Acutaas, Jubilant Ingrevia, Neogen Chemicals among top picks.
news.summary:
UPL's demerger structure raises concerns due to holding company discounts, potentially capping shareholder value.
Kotak highlights chemical sector gains from easing tariffs; Acutaas, Jubilant Ingrevia, Neogen Chemicals among top picks.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia targets 20%+ long-term EBITDA growth, aiming for 25%+ margins in specialty chemicals.
The company plans to maintain 25% margins consistently, with FY2027 pivotal for capacity utilization.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia targets 20%+ long-term EBITDA growth, aiming for 25%+ margins in specialty chemicals.
The company plans to maintain 25% margins consistently, with FY2027 pivotal for capacity utilization.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia uploaded Q3 FY25 investor call audio, held on Feb 5, 2026.
Audio accessible via company website; disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia uploaded Q3 FY25 investor call audio, held on Feb 5, 2026.
Audio accessible via company website; disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia's Q3 net profit declined to 469M INR from 694M YoY.
Revenue slightly dipped to 10.5B INR from 10.57B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia's Q3 net profit declined to 469M INR from 694M YoY.
Revenue slightly dipped to 10.5B INR from 10.57B INR YoY.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia declares Rs.2.5 interim dividend/share; face value Re.1.
Record date set for Feb 10, 2026; dividend payment by Mar 4, 2026.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia declares Rs.2.5 interim dividend/share; face value Re.1.
Record date set for Feb 10, 2026; dividend payment by Mar 4, 2026.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd's board to meet on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 FY25 results.
Unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results will be posted on its website.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd's board to meet on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 FY25 results.
Unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results will be posted on its website.

news.title:
India Ratings affirmed Jubilant Ingrevia's bank loan facilities rating at IND AAA/Stable/A1.
Debt size reduced to Rs. 23,883.8M from Rs. 24,200M; commercial paper rating withdrawn.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirmed Jubilant Ingrevia's bank loan facilities rating at IND AAA/Stable/A1.
Debt size reduced to Rs. 23,883.8M from Rs. 24,200M; commercial paper rating withdrawn.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd redeems Rs. 50 Cr CP with ISIN INE0BY014425 on Nov 21, 2025.
CP was issued on Sep 25, 2025; redemption affirmed to BSE and NSE regulatory records.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd redeems Rs. 50 Cr CP with ISIN INE0BY014425 on Nov 21, 2025.
CP was issued on Sep 25, 2025; redemption affirmed to BSE and NSE regulatory records.

news.title:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd reports Q2 FY26 revenue of Rs 1,121cr, up 7% YoY, driven by Specialty Chemicals and Chemical Intermediates growth.
EBITDA grew 8% YoY, PAT increased 18%; Specialty Chemicals segment achieved 25% margins, nutrition volumes steady amid pricing pressures.
news.summary:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd reports Q2 FY26 revenue of Rs 1,121cr, up 7% YoY, driven by Specialty Chemicals and Chemical Intermediates growth.
EBITDA grew 8% YoY, PAT increased 18%; Specialty Chemicals segment achieved 25% margins, nutrition volumes steady amid pricing pressures.
